text: SSE handling buffers full response before emitting — can deadlock long-lived/incremental SSE streams
SSE parser is not spec-complete: no multi-line data assembly, requires space after 'data:', silently drops parse failures causing client hangs
No fetch timeout/AbortController means one hung HTTP request stalls entire serial queue indefinitely
SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers exit immediately, skipping session cleanup and in-flight drain
Protocol surface narrower than full MCP Streamable HTTP: no GET SSE stream, no resumability
Unbounded queue and stdout writes ignoring backpressure
SDK StreamableHTTPClientTransport already in project dependencies — should be used instead of hand-rolling SSE/session
Concession-to-fix mismatch: conceded multi-line SSE is broken but V1 fixes don't address it
Mandating MUNIN_AUTH_TOKEN at startup could break CF-only deployments
Hardcoded 30s timeout doesn't account for legitimate long-running tool calls — should be configurable
